vectors.expected_repository_effect: Exactly one new branch, one commit, one draft PR, and one new Markdown file; main unchanged.
vectors.name: Ordinary single-file create
vectors.purpose: Prove the smallest approved ordinary projects/ CREATE_FILE transaction.
required_noctua_assertions: One-file fidelity; exact metadata; no extra path; no direct-main, force, merge, or settings mutation.
required_receipt_evidence: Exact packet, manifest, Preview, base, target absence, branch, commit, PR, and non-authority fields.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: One branch, one commit, one draft PR; exactly one full-file replacement; main unchanged.
vectors.name: Exact full-file replacement
vectors.purpose: Prove REPLACE_FILE_FULL only succeeds against the exact expected old blob.
required_noctua_assertions: No silent deletion outside approved replacement; old/new identities match Preview.
required_receipt_evidence: Old and new Git blob identities, content SHA-256, complete changed-file list, validation results.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: One branch, one single-parent commit containing all three files, one draft PR; no partial commit.
vectors.name: Atomic three-file create
vectors.purpose: Prove a bounded multi-file transaction is all-or-nothing.
required_noctua_assertions: No missing or extra file; one-commit atomicity; packet-to-tree fidelity.
required_receipt_evidence: All three target states and hashes; exact one-commit tree; deterministic branch and PR.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No new branch or commit; exactly one draft PR is created.
vectors.name: Exact branch pushed, PR missing recovery
vectors.purpose: Prove safe recovery after a successful branch push and failed PR creation.
required_noctua_assertions: Recovery created no duplicate branch or commit; PR metadata matches exact approved body.
required_receipt_evidence: Previous BRANCH_PUSHED_PR_MISSING state, exact branch and commit identities, recovery action.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation; existing branch, commit, and PR are returned.
vectors.name: Exact completed transaction idempotent replay
vectors.purpose: Prove an identical retry returns the existing transaction without duplication.
required_noctua_assertions: No second branch, commit, or PR; unchanged server metadata.
required_receipt_evidence: Existing transaction identities and proof of exact equality.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: One harmless file change only after manual merge; complete lineage and recovery evidence.
vectors.name: Harmless end-to-end proof vector
vectors.purpose: Define the later A4 harmless proof without granting authority to run it now.
required_noctua_assertions: Packet-to-PR-to-main fidelity; Phoenix rollback planning; Codex remains canonical and Prime remains SHADOW.
required_receipt_evidence: All A2 receipt fields plus merge and readback evidence.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No branch, commit, PR, or file change.
vectors.name: Non-owner actor rejected
vectors.purpose: Prove only the repository owner can dispatch S1.
required_noctua_assertions: Actor was checked before packet-selected behavior.
required_receipt_evidence: Authenticated actor and rejection code; no token material.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Wrong event rejected
vectors.purpose: Prove S1 accepts only workflow_dispatch.
required_noctua_assertions: No apply job; no elevated permission path.
required_receipt_evidence: Event type and rejection code.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Wrong repository rejected
vectors.purpose: Prove repository binding is exact.
required_noctua_assertions: No target lookup or write path executed.
required_receipt_evidence: Observed and expected repository.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Duplicate JSON keys rejected
vectors.purpose: Prove strict parsing prevents ambiguous packet or envelope meaning.
required_noctua_assertions: No canonicalization of ambiguous input.
required_receipt_evidence: Transport hash and parser rejection without echoing protected content.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Transport and decompression limits enforced
vectors.purpose: Prove payload size and compression-ratio limits block bombs and oversized dispatches.
required_noctua_assertions: No unbounded memory or artifact creation.
required_receipt_evidence: Encoded length, decoded length when safe, configured limits, rejection code.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Packet transport hash mismatch
vectors.purpose: Prove the exact transported packet bytes are bound.
required_noctua_assertions: No normalized-manifest generation accepted from mismatched transport.
required_receipt_evidence: Expected and observed hashes.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Manifest hash mismatch
vectors.purpose: Prove compile output cannot drift from the approved normalized manifest.
required_noctua_assertions: No branch creation.
required_receipt_evidence: Expected and observed manifest hashes.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Preview hash mismatch
vectors.purpose: Prove an old or related approval cannot authorize a changed Preview.
required_noctua_assertions: No freeform reinterpretation.
required_receipt_evidence: Expected and observed Preview hashes; approval reference.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No branch, commit, or PR.
vectors.name: Expired plan or approval rejected
vectors.purpose: Prove stale approval cannot be replayed.
required_noctua_assertions: No clock-skew widening beyond explicit tolerance.
required_receipt_evidence: Plan creation and expiration times, current workflow time, rejection.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Approval scope does not authorize draft PR
vectors.purpose: Prove a valid review without explicit CREATE_DRAFT_PR_ONLY authority is insufficient.
required_noctua_assertions: No inference from prior Noctua YES or packet validity.
required_receipt_evidence: Approval source/reference and normalized approved scope.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Stale base detected in PLAN
vectors.purpose: Prove PLAN binds current remote main to the approved base.
required_noctua_assertions: Contracts loaded from no other commit.
required_receipt_evidence: Expected and observed remote-main SHA.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No branch, commit, or PR.
vectors.name: Remote main advances before branch creation
vectors.purpose: Close the proven TOCTOU race at the first write boundary.
required_noctua_assertions: No branch object or ref created.
required_receipt_evidence: PLAN base, current remote main, last completed gate.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No remote branch ref or PR.
vectors.name: Remote main advances before push
vectors.purpose: Prove a local proposed commit cannot be pushed after base drift.
required_noctua_assertions: No force or transplant attempt.
required_receipt_evidence: Current remote main and preserved local evidence identity.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: Existing exact branch preserved; no PR created.
vectors.name: Remote main advances before PR creation
vectors.purpose: Prove a pushed branch does not automatically gain a PR after base drift.
required_noctua_assertions: No rebase, force push, or silent PR creation.
required_receipt_evidence: Branch/commit state, remote-main drift, next safe action.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No branch, commit, or PR.
vectors.name: Stale replacement target blob
vectors.purpose: Prove replacement state is checked in PLAN and independently in APPLY.
required_noctua_assertions: No content replacement attempted.
required_receipt_evidence: Expected and observed target blobs.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No branch, commit, or PR.
vectors.name: Schema or policy blob drift
vectors.purpose: Prove controlling contract identities are pinned to the approved base and plan.
required_noctua_assertions: No fallback to current working-tree contracts.
required_receipt_evidence: Expected and observed contract blob identities.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No Git target lookup and no repository mutation.
vectors.name: Path validation precedes Git lookup
vectors.purpose: Close A1-F02 across malformed, traversal, control-character, backslash, and normalization inputs.
required_noctua_assertions: Lookup spy confirms zero calls.
required_receipt_evidence: Path category only; do not echo prohibited raw values where unsafe.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No lookup or repository mutation.
vectors.name: Protected or denied path rejected
vectors.purpose: Prove ordinary S1 cannot target migration, workflow, policy, schema, tool, register, generated, or root-governance paths.
required_noctua_assertions: No route widening by packet content.
required_receipt_evidence: Denied class and policy identity.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No branch, commit, or PR.
vectors.name: Symlink target or ancestor rejected
vectors.purpose: Prove path containment cannot escape through symlinks.
required_noctua_assertions: No dereferenced external content captured.
required_receipt_evidence: Affected logical path and safe category.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No branch, commit, or PR.
vectors.name: Submodule target or ancestor rejected
vectors.purpose: Prove Gitlinks cannot be modified through ordinary S1.
required_noctua_assertions: No nested repository mutation.
required_receipt_evidence: Object type and logical path.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Case or normalization collision rejected
vectors.purpose: Prove two operations cannot collapse to the same logical path.
required_noctua_assertions: No platform-dependent acceptance.
required_receipt_evidence: Collision category and operation indexes.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Activation policy alone cannot authorize
vectors.purpose: Prove the red-team activation bypass is closed.
required_noctua_assertions: One gate alone never enables write permission.
required_receipt_evidence: Both policy identities and each authority value.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Destination policy alone cannot authorize
vectors.purpose: Prove destination authorization cannot bypass the separate activation record.
required_noctua_assertions: No implied activation.
required_receipt_evidence: Both policy identities and each authority value.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No repository mutation.
vectors.name: Dual activation operation mismatch
vectors.purpose: Prove the two authority surfaces must agree exactly.
required_noctua_assertions: No union, widening, or permissive fallback.
required_receipt_evidence: Exact normalized authority sets and references.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No new branch, commit, or PR.
vectors.name: Same packet ID with changed content
vectors.purpose: Prove packet_id is the durable transaction identity and cannot generate a second branch.
required_noctua_assertions: Branch identity remains one-to-one with packet ID.
required_receipt_evidence: Prior and attempted hashes; deterministic transaction key.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: At most one branch, one commit, and one PR.
vectors.name: Concurrent duplicate dispatch
vectors.purpose: Prove concurrency is keyed by Jktomy/atlas-prime plus packet_id with cancel-in-progress false.
required_noctua_assertions: No cancelled run silently mutates.
required_receipt_evidence: Run IDs, attempts, lock key, winning/queued outcome.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: Existing branch preserved; no force update, second branch, or PR repair.
vectors.name: Existing branch collision
vectors.purpose: Prove any non-identical branch state blocks without repair.
required_noctua_assertions: No automatic cleanup or history rewrite.
required_receipt_evidence: Observed branch/commit/PR identities and exact mismatch.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: Existing branch preserved; no PR creation or repair.
vectors.name: Multi-parent commit rejected
vectors.purpose: Close the proven crafted-merge-commit recovery weakness.
required_noctua_assertions: Exactly one parent required.
required_receipt_evidence: Full parent list and expected sole parent.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: Existing branch preserved; no PR creation.
vectors.name: Modified full commit message rejected
vectors.purpose: Close acceptance of extra bodies or trailers under the approved subject.
required_noctua_assertions: Exact full commit message required.
required_receipt_evidence: Expected and observed full-message hashes.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: Existing branch preserved; no PR creation.
vectors.name: Unexpected author or committer rejected
vectors.purpose: Prove commit identity policy is explicit and enforced.
required_noctua_assertions: No trust based only on tree equality.
required_receipt_evidence: Expected policy and observed safe identity fields.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: Branch and PR preserved for audit; no automated repair.
vectors.name: Server-created PR metadata mutated
vectors.purpose: Close the proven title/body verification weakness.
required_noctua_assertions: Exact title and full body verified, including all A2 evidence and non-authorities.
required_receipt_evidence: Expected and observed title/body hashes, PR number, branch and commit.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No second PR until state is resolved; branch preserved.
vectors.name: PR API uncertainty after possible creation
vectors.purpose: Prevent duplicate PRs when the client fails after the server may have created one.
required_noctua_assertions: At most one PR; uncertain state is not treated as absence.
required_receipt_evidence: Request identity, uncertainty code, exact search/readback evidence.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No extra mutation beyond the last explicitly completed gate.
vectors.name: Receipt emitted for every failed gate
vectors.purpose: Prove every PLAN and APPLY attempt leaves bounded machine-readable evidence.
required_noctua_assertions: Receipt exists and is uploaded with failure-safe behavior; no protected values.
required_receipt_evidence: Last completed gate, blocker, state, all available identities, explicit non-authorities, redaction result.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No unauthorized repository mutation and no leaked sentinel values.
vectors.name: Credential and protected-value leakage blocked
vectors.purpose: Prove token material and prohibited values never reach logs, artifacts, receipts, PR text, or packet-selected commands.
required_noctua_assertions: Logs, artifacts, receipt, PR body, and exception text contain no sentinel.
required_receipt_evidence: Category-only findings, no detected values.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: Only approved branch/commit/draft-PR operations are reachable.
vectors.name: Forbidden capability static and dynamic denial
vectors.purpose: Prove no direct-main, force-push, merge, auto-merge, workflow self-modification, branch deletion, PR closure, review dismissal, or settings mutation path exists.
required_noctua_assertions: Static source scan and dynamic spies agree.
required_receipt_evidence: Invoked commands/endpoints allowlist and zero forbidden calls.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No merge authorization.
vectors.name: Expected PR checks require human approval and success
vectors.purpose: Prove action_required, missing approval, skipped jobs, absent expected jobs, or failed checks do not pass Noctua.
required_noctua_assertions: Only manually approved and successful expected checks qualify.
required_receipt_evidence: Expected jobs, observed states, approval requirement, run identities.

vectors.expected_repository_effect: No automated rollback by S1; separate reviewed recovery path only.
vectors.name: Rollback and replacement-PR planning
vectors.purpose: Define Phoenix proof without letting S1 execute rollback.
required_noctua_assertions: Phoenix independently validates recovery claim.
required_receipt_evidence: Original and recovery lineage, conflict state, readback requirements.
